definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The harness closes with green tests and approved planning-gate implementation/finalize artifacts.

definition_of_done.verifier_acceptance_condition: Verifier sees passing tests, implementation evidence, and finalize ok=true.

fallback_or_rollback: Do not claim completion without governed approval artifacts.
primary_behavior: Add focused regression coverage and close the governed track with validated implementation artifacts.
